source_pr.title: *: build and use count-min sketch
source_pr.body:
This PR builds count-min sketch when analyze and use it for point queries. Especially, we do not build it for primary key when it is handle and the unique index.
PTAL @coocood  @hanfei1991 @winoros @zz-jason

symptoms: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
failure_signature: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: build and use count-min sketch.

evidence: evidence: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.

files: bootstrap.go, domain/domain.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/analyze.go, executor/builder.go, session.go, statistics/builder.go, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle.go, statistics/handle_test.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/sample.go, statistics/sample_test.go, statistics/statistics_test.go, statistics/table.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/analyze.go
